raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"The artifact makes explicit statistical claims (CIs, p-value, mixed-effects model) and a study-design argument; logical consistency of inference chain from design to conclusion is a natural 'check' target.","R1.3":"Results section asserts pre/post accuracy figures and ties them to a contribution claim; verifying those numbers are internally consistent and match what the described methodology could actually produce is central to any 'check'.","R1.6":"'Check this' commonly resolves to prose review; sentence-level clarity, hedging language, and paragraph coherence are all plausible primary targets — making this equally load-bearing until scope is clarified."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should I prioritize checking logical and statistical validity (study design, reported CIs, significance claim, and conclusion soundness), or writing quality and prose clarity — or both equally?"}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact makes explicit statistical claims (CIs, p-value, mixed-effects model) and a study-design argument; logical consistency of inference chain from design to conclusion is a natural 'check' target.
rationale.R1.3: Results section asserts pre/post accuracy figures and ties them to a contribution claim; verifying those numbers are internally consistent and match what the described methodology could actually produce is central to any 'check'.
rationale.R1.6: 'Check this' commonly resolves to prose review; sentence-level clarity, hedging language, and paragraph coherence are all plausible primary targets — making this equally load-bearing until scope is clarified.

parsed.clarification_question: Should I prioritize checking logical and statistical validity (study design, reported CIs, significance claim, and conclusion soundness), or writing quality and prose clarity — or both equally?
